chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1533 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 03.11.2016. Mr. Noor Ahmed alias Rabbani, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Sher Muhammad Laghari, State Counsel. -.-.-. Counsel for petitioner today submits that after filing of this petition, private respondents have mended their ways and have stopped causing harassment to the petitioner and not forcing them to work for private respondents at their brick kiln. In this regard, official respondents have filed their reply/written statement and respondent No.2 SSP Hyderabad as well as respondent No.3 concerned SHO P.S Pabban have stated, inter alia, that police will provide the petitioner requisite protection whenever they are approached with such a request. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in view of the above observation and with directions that private respondents should desist from causing harassment to the petitioner and official respondents being police officials will provide protection to the petitioner in accordance with law whenever they are approached with such a request. JUDGE
